preprocessing_by_model.LogisticRegression: median impute + StandardScaler for numeric; most_frequent impute + OneHotEncoder for categorical
preprocessing_by_model.RandomForestClassifier: median impute for numeric; most_frequent impute + OneHotEncoder for categorical
preprocessing_by_model.ExtraTreesClassifier: median impute for numeric; most_frequent impute + OneHotEncoder for categorical
preprocessing_by_model.HistGradientBoostingClassifier: median impute for numeric; most_frequent impute + OrdinalEncoder for categorical
